title: stilbe serrulata
intro: Stilbe serrulata, also known as sweet-scented woodruff or sweet woodruff, is a perennial herb native to Europe and North America, characterized by its white, star-shaped flowers and sweet fragrance. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Stilbe serrulata include its ability to improve digestion, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote restful sleep. Stilbe serrulata can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried herb, and is often used in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
